long_description:
[COM] Service node count below threshold is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL: https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/sysdig_node_count_below_threshold.html
TIP Situation: Service node count below threshold 
TIP Short Description: Servicenode count in mzone2p7 is below threshold 
TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-genctl:::mzone2p7:node:N/A

Event Generated:

Severity:         High
Metric:
    (sum by (kube_cluster_name)(kube_node_status_condition{condition="Ready", status="true", kube_cluster_name =~ "mzone.*", kube_node_label_genctl_role_service="true"}) < 3) OR (absent(kube_node_status_condition{ kube_cluster_name =~ "mzone.*", kube_node_label_genctl_role_service="true"})) = 2
Segment:
    kube_cluster_name = 'mzone2p7'

Time:             12/03/2025 12:31 PM UTC
State:            Triggered
Notification URL: https://jp-osa.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/2c4a1985f9d5c10bd4842d2d3989088e/ee162ec9-ba7d-4c3e-b399-7cb2badb0efb?redirectRoute=%2Fevents%2Fnotifications%2Fl%3A2419200%2F11520132%2Fdetails

------

Triggered by Alert:

Type:         Prometheus
Name:         [COM] Service node count below threshold
Description:  Service node count reached below the threshold
Team:         Monitor Operations
Scope:
    Everywhere
Alert When:   (sum by (kube_cluster_name)(kube_node_status_condition{condition="Ready", status="true", kube_cluster_name =~ "mzone.*", kube_node_label_genctl_role_service="true"}) < 3) OR (absent(kube_node_status_condition{ kube_cluster_name =~ "mzone.*", kube_node_label_genctl_role_service="true"}))
Duration: 1 h
Alert URL:    https://jp-osa.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/2c4a1985f9d5c10bd4842d2d3989088e/ee162ec9-ba7d-4c3e-b399-7cb2badb0efb?redirectRoute=%2Falerts%2Frules%3FalertId%3D214885
